rulings.Case Title: BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS SUCCESSOR VS. STEPHANIE NAIFEH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Separate Trial On Special Defense; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday 8, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANTs ADAM WHITE and SAMUEL SEGALL's Motion For Separate Trial On Special Defense; Request For Judicial Notice. Deny, moving party failed to sustain burdern; court concurs with opposing party argument. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS SUCCESSOR VS. STEPHANIE NAIFEH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday 8, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT STEFANIE NAIFEH's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. Deny, 1) Untimely under CCP 473 and even if timely not excusable as matter of law. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DE ANZA FLP VS. STERLING BANK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant/Cross-Complainant Sterling Savings Bank'S Motion For Orde Appointing Receiver
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday 8, 2012, line 2. Defendant/Cross-Complainant Sterling Savings Bank'S Motion For Order Appointing Receiver. Grant, no timely opposition plus non compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6b. Prevailing party to prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RYAN HENDERSON VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. A NATIONAL ASSOCIATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday 8, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. A NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Continued to June 8, 2012.
